KHAS Education Model

A model that transcends traditional education methods, where all academic and professional competencies are transferred to students through projects developed with our leading industry partners.

Core Program

The Core Program is designed to bring together all students from different departments with different backgrounds in their first academic term with a common curriculum.

Project-Based Education

Project-Based Education offers the opportunity to learn by experiencing rather than memorizing. Course programs are prepared in collaboration with leading industry representatives; each student is assigned an academic and industry mentor.

Research

As one of Turkey's most important research universities, Kadir Has University continues to progress with the right strategies and achieve success in various disciplines.
